blocks.text: WORM'S SURPRISE Worm didhit explode. Instead, the dragon closes his eyes. Then the rocks blocking the tunnel begins to shake. "What's happening?!" Bo yells. "Is Worm doing that?" asks Ana.

sentences.text: Instead, the dragon closes his eyes.
Then the rocks blocking the tunnel begins to shake.

blocks.text: "I think ... I think he's using the power of his mind," Drake says. He isn't sure how he knows. He just does. Rori, Ana, and Bo steps back. The rocks keeps shaking. Then... Poof! The rocks break up into tiny pieces. Rock dust fills the air. Drake coughs, waving the dust away with his hand. All of the fallen rocks are gone. The tunnel is clear again!

sentences.text: I think he's using the power of his mind," Drake says.
He isn't sure how he knows.
Rori, Ana, and Bo steps back.
The rocks break up into tiny pieces.
Drake coughs, waving the dust away with his hand.
All of the fallen rocks are gone.

blocks.text: Drake hugs Worm. "You do it, Worm!" "We should get out of here before Vulcan sneezes from all this dust," says Rori. "The last time he sneezes he turns my bread into toast." "Rori's right," says Bo. "Lets's get out of here."

sentences.text: "We should get out of here before Vulcan sneezes from all this dust," says Rori.
"The last time he sneezes he turns my bread into toast."

blocks.text: Drake steps through the pile of rubble - and finds himself face-to-face with Griffith. Simon the guard stands behind Griffith. "You are all in big trouble!" the wizard says. "The whole castle is awake. And King Roland is furious!"

sentences.text: Drake steps through the pile of rubble - and finds himself face-to-face with Griffith.
Simon the guard stands behind Griffith.
